expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus: it states the "Developer smoke checklist requirement (README.md): ... derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios during Phase 7" and further notes finalPlanSummary.mjs "extracts rows ... where scenario lines contain `<P1>` or `[ANALOG-GATE]`".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md declares "Primary phase under test: phase7" and ties the described outputs to Phase 7 responsibilities (qa_plan_final.md, context/finalization_record_<feature-id>.md, context/final_plan_summary_<feature-id>.md) and states README.md lists developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md as generated "during Phase 7".
